notes: Codex/gpt-5.4 was unavailable (DNS/service outage). All 65 concerns from Gemini only.

accepted_concerns.summary: Fingerprint concatenation collision — no delimiter between components
accepted_concerns.fix: Added \x00 byte separators between concatenated inputs

accepted_concerns.summary: architecture_fingerprint nullability contradiction — required but null in skip mode
accepted_concerns.fix: Made nullable in schema, clarified computation order

accepted_concerns.summary: realtime concern_category orphaned — no enum value for Concern 12
Decision journal rationale data loss — idempotency key excludes rationale
framework_profile discriminated union — no discriminator field
failed_checks nullability ambiguous — unclear if [] or null
Stale lock TOCTOU — check+break not atomic, 30min too long
accepted_concerns.fix: Atomic break-lock protocol, reduced to 5min interactive / 60min batch, added signal handler

accepted_concerns.summary: Multi-file artifact inconsistency — no set atomicity
accepted_concerns.fix: Added staging protocol with ordered renames and resume cleanup

accepted_concerns.summary: Lock purgatory after Ctrl+C — 30min stale threshold too long
accepted_concerns.fix: Reduced to 5min, added SIGINT handler and --break-lock escape

accepted_concerns.summary: Slug drift creating zombie artifacts — directory rename breaks paths
accepted_concerns.fix: Required slug field in manifest.json, directory extraction as validated fallback

accepted_concerns.summary: Fingerprint flapping on resume — volatile metadata in spec hash
Silent decision reversal gap — reversed decisions don't invalidate invariants
accepted_concerns.fix: Reversal marks affected invariants as reversed, dry-run must re-verify

accepted_concerns.summary: Cross-device atomic rename failure — /tmp vs project dir
accepted_concerns.fix: Temp files must be in same directory as target

accepted_concerns.summary: Markdown marker injection — LLM output could corrupt upsert
accepted_concerns.fix: Added marker integrity check + P4_MARKER_INTEGRITY_FAILED error

accepted_concerns.summary: Phase 7 stale architecture consumption — no fingerprint back-link
accepted_concerns.fix: Added spec_fingerprint to phase_artifacts for staleness detection

accepted_concerns.summary: Skip mode information vacuum — empty invariants without context

accepted_concerns.fix: Research findings snapshotted into bootstrap, included in fingerprint

accepted_concerns.summary: Matrix dimension collapse — multi-component surface collision
accepted_concerns.fix: Component-prefixed matrix columns when components[] exists

acknowledged_concerns.summary: Temp file name collision — valid but session lock prevents
Marker injection full fix (separate file) deferred to v2
Agent protocol adherence assumption — fundamental to LLM workflows
checks_run enum enforcement — added note, full enforcement is impl detail
